heading: Definitions
label: 15721 Definitions
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 11141 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)

children.heading: .—Carrier, lessor
children.label: 1 .—Carrier, lessor
children.text: The terms “carrier” and “lessor” include a receiver or trustee of a pipeline carrier and lessor, respectively.

children.heading: .—Lessor
children.label: 2 .—Lessor
children.text: The term “lessor” means a person owning a pipeline that is leased to and operated by a carrier providing transportation under this part.

children.heading: .—Association
children.label: 3 .—Association
children.text: The term “association” means an organization maintained by or in the interest of a group of pipeline carriers that performs a service, or engages in activities, related to transportation under this part.
